message:
perf: stack-pin CatchUnwind and eliminate Box::pin allocations in scope

CatchUnwind previously heap-allocated its inner future via Pin<Box<F>>.
Refactor to use pin_project for structural pinning, eliminating the
heap allocation on every spawn.

- CatchUnwind now uses #[pin] field projection instead of Pin<Box<F>>
- RegionRunner::fut changes from Pin<Box<CatchUnwind<Fut>>> to
  Pin<&'a mut CatchUnwind<Fut>> via std::pin::pin!()
- Scope::race() removes Box::pin from join futures, using direct
  Pin::new() since join futures are Unpin
- Cx::race_with_timeout uses std::pin::pin!() instead of Box::pin

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
